heading: Limitation on use of certain export promotion programs
label: 5676 Limitation on use of certain export promotion programs

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary may provide that a person shall be ineligible for participation in an export program established under title I of the Food for Peace Act [ et seq.], or in any other export credit, credit guarantee, bonus, or other export program carried out through, or administered by, the Commodity Credit Corporation or carried out with funds made available pursuant to with respect to the export of any agricultural commodity or product that has been or will be used as the basis for a claim of a refund, as drawback, pursuant to , of any duty, tax, or fee imposed under Federal law on an imported commodity or product.7 U.S.C. 1701section 612c of this titlesection 1313(j)(2) of title 19

children.heading: Vegetable oil
children.label: b Vegetable oil
children.text: A person shall be ineligible for participation in any of the export programs referred to in subsection (a) with respect to the export of vegetable oil or a vegetable oil product that has been or will be used as the basis for a claim of a refund, as a drawback, pursuant to , of any duty, tax, or fee imposed under Federal law on an imported commodity or product.section 1313 of title 19

children.heading: Certification
children.label: c Certification
children.text: If the Secretary takes action under the authority granted under subsection (a), a person applying to export any agricultural commodity under the export programs referred to in subsection (a) shall certify that none of the commodity has been or will be used as the basis of a claim for any refund specified in subsection (a), except that regardless of whether the Secretary takes action under the authority granted under subsection (a), a person applying to export any vegetable oil or vegetable oil product under such programs shall certify that none of the vegetable oil or vegetable oil product has been or will be used as the basis of a claim for any refund specified in subsection (b).

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: d Regulations
children.text: The Secretary shall promulgate regulations to carry out this section.

children.heading: Applicability
children.label: e Applicability
children.text: This section shall not apply to quantities of agricultural commodities and products with respect to which an exporter has entered into a contract, prior to , for an export sale.November 28, 1990
